extra.reason: Ported the Bootstrap dark shell (blue accent), sectioned settings menu with food sections removed, seeded demo keys on both surfaces, wired driver list, and added the autopi-update OTA script. Per-driver action forms (AutoPi-0jw) and deck face parity (AutoPi-3jm) remain open.

Built the deck-shaped, paginated editor with categorized palette, model/rotation/brightness controls, connected-deck scaling via controller status reports, and shared Start Page / Stream Deck surfaces.
